channel.title: Game-Modding on mypersBLOG
channel.description: Recent content in Game-Modding on mypersBLOG

item.title: Porting a TypeScript Game Mod to C# and Hardening It for Community Release
item.description: How I ported the BiggerBang SPT mod from TypeScript to C#/.NET for the SPT 4.0 server rewrite, fixed five real bugs in the process, and packaged it for release.
